'''zatata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalocele|encephalocele]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalocele|encephalocele]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zatata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zætætæth|zætætæth]] || [[word:zætætæj|zætætæj]] || [[word:zætætæsh|zætætæsh]] || [[word:zætætæ|zætætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zatatatath|zatatatath]] || [[word:zatatataj|zatatataj]] || [[word:zatatatash|zatatatash]] || [[word:zatatata|zatatata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zatatath|zatatath]] || [[word:zatataj|zatataj]] || [[word:zatatash|zatatash]] || [[word:zatata|zatata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zataftath|zataftath]] || [[word:zataftaj|zataftaj]] || [[word:zataftash|zataftash]] || [[word:zataftaf|zataftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zatatatha|zatatatha]] || [[word:zatataja|zatataja]] || [[word:zatatasha|zatatasha]] || [[word:zatataka|zatataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zatatath|zatatath]] || [[word:zatataj|zatataj]] || [[word:zatatash|zatatash]] || [[word:zatata|zatata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zatatathal|zatatathal]] || [[word:zatatajal|zatatajal]] || [[word:zatatashal|zatatashal]] || [[word:zatatakal|zatatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zatatathatha|zatatathatha]] || [[word:zatatajaja|zatatajaja]] || [[word:zatatashasha|zatatashasha]] || [[word:zatataka|zatataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zatatathan|zatatathan]] || [[word:zatatajan|zatatajan]] || [[word:zatatashan|zatatashan]] || [[word:zatatakan|zatatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zatatathaoro|zatatathaoro]] || [[word:zatatajaoro|zatatajaoro]] || [[word:zatatashaoro|zatatashaoro]] || [[word:zatatakaoro|zatatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
